name: Patrick Leahy
abstract: Patrick Joseph Leahy ( LAY-hee; born March 31, 1940) is an American politician and attorney who represented Vermont in the United States Senate from 1975 to 2023. A member of the Democratic Party, he served as the president pro tempore of the United States Senate from 2012 to 2015 and again from 2021 to 2023.

about_quotes.speaker: Hentoff Nat
about_quotes.evidence: I could give you a person right now whom I have enormous respect for: that’s a Senator from Vermont named Patrick Leahy
about_quotes.doc_title: Hentoff Nat — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
